allow: Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS fertilizer; CREATE DATABASE fertilizer DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 fertilizer -e "SHOW CREATE TABLE sys_user\\G")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 fertilizer -e "INSERT INTO sys_user \(id, username, password, real_name, role\) VALUES \(1, 'admin', 'x', 'test', 'admin'\)")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 fertilizer -e "INSERT INTO sys_user \(id, username, password, real_name, role\) VALUES \(3, 'test2', 'pwd', '系统管理员', 'admin'\)")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 fertilizer -e "SELECT real_name, CHAR_LENGTH\(real_name\), LENGTH\(real_name\) FROM sys_user WHERE id=3")
